exercises.name: Barbell Bent-over Row
exercises.preparation: Bend knees slightly and bend over bar with back straight. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip.
exercises.execution: Pull bar to upper waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.
instructions: Bend knees slightly and bend over bar with back straight. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip.
Pull bar to upper waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Barbell Underhand Bent-over Row
exercises.preparation: Bend knees slightly and bend over bar with back straight. Grasp bar with underhand grip.
exercises.execution: Pull bar to waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.
instructions: Bend knees slightly and bend over bar with back straight. Grasp bar with underhand grip.
Pull bar to waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.
exercises.breadcrumb: ToolsExercise LibraryWorkout TemplatesMuscle DirectoryJoint ArticulationsFitness CalculatorsWorkout Web AppWorkout Tools Mobile AppFitTrek Mobile AppTopicsBeginning Exe

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.preparation: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip.
exercises.execution: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip.
Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
exercises.breadcrumb: ToolsExercise LibraryWorkout TemplatesMuscle DirectoryJoint ArticulationsFitness CalculatorsWorkout Web AppWorkout Tools Mobile AppFitTrek Mobile AppTopicsBeginning Exe

exercises.name: Inverted Row (feet elevated)
exercises.preparation: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Place back of heels on elevated surface.
exercises.execution: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Place back of heels on elevated surface.
Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Row (high bar)
exercises.preparation: Stand facing arms length away from waist to head height horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Position body under bar with legs, hips and spine straight. Arms should be straight, approximately perpendicular to body. Heels should make contact with floor.
exercises.execution: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Stand facing arms length away from waist to head height horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Position body under bar with legs, hips and spine straight. Arms should be straight, approximately perpendicular to body. Heels should make contact with floor.
Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Inverted Biceps Row
exercises.preparation: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with shoulder width underhand grip.
exercises.execution: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with shoulder width underhand grip.
Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Biceps Row (high bar)
exercises.preparation: Stand facing arms length away from waist to head height horizontal bar. Grasp bar with shoulder width underhand grip. Position body under bar with legs, hips and spine straight. Arms should be straight, approximately perpendicular to body. Heels should make contact with floor with feet about perpendicular to legs.
exercises.execution: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Stand facing arms length away from waist to head height horizontal bar. Grasp bar with shoulder width underhand grip. Position body under bar with legs, hips and spine straight. Arms should be straight, approximately perpendicular to body. Heels should make contact with floor with feet about perpendicular to legs.
Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Bent-over Row
exercises.preparation: Grasp cable stirrup. Step back away from pulley, with foot on same side as exercising arm, positioned out to side well behind forward foot. Bend over with hand on nearby bar or above knee for support. Keep back straight and knees slightly bent. Allow shoulder with stirrup to be pulled forward.
exercises.execution: Pull cable attachment to side of torso, pulling shoulder back. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is stretched forward. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.
instructions: Grasp cable stirrup. Step back away from pulley, with foot on same side as exercising arm, positioned out to side well behind forward foot. Bend over with hand on nearby bar or above knee for support. Keep back straight and knees slightly bent. Allow shoulder with stirrup to be pulled forward.
Pull cable attachment to side of torso, pulling shoulder back. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is stretched forward. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.
exercises.breadcrumb: ToolsExercise LibraryWorkout TemplatesMuscle DirectoryJoint ArticulationsFitness CalculatorsWorkout Web AppWorkout Tools Mobile AppFitTrek Mobile AppTopicsBeginning Exe

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Straight Back Seated High Row
exercises.preparation: Sit on seat or bench. Bend forward and grasp cable stirrup with one hand. Position torso upright allowing shoulder to be pulled forward under weight on cable.
exercises.execution: Pull cable attachment to side of torso while pulling shoulder back, arching spine, and pushing chest forward. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is pulled forward. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.
instructions: Sit on seat or bench. Bend forward and grasp cable stirrup with one hand. Position torso upright allowing shoulder to be pulled forward under weight on cable.

Pull cable attachment to side of torso while pulling shoulder back, arching spine, and pushing chest forward. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is pulled forward. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

exercises.name: Cable Seated Row
exercises.preparation: Sit slightly forward on seat or bench in order to grasp cable attachment. Place feet on vertical platform. Slide hips back positioning knees with slight bend.
exercises.execution: Pull cable attachment to waist while straightening lower back. Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.
instructions: Sit slightly forward on seat or bench in order to grasp cable attachment. Place feet on vertical platform. Slide hips back positioning knees with slight bend.

exercises.name: Cable Straight Back Seated Row
exercises.preparation: Sit slightly forward on bench with feet on foot bar or vertical platform. Grasp close grip cable attachment. Straighten torso upright and slide hips back so knees are slightly bent.
exercises.execution: Pull cable attachment to waist. Pull shoulders back and lift chest by arching back. Return until arms are extended, back is straight, and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Wide Grip Seated Row
exercises.preparation: Sit slightly forward on platform in order to grasp cable attachment with wider than shoulder width grip. Place feet on vertical platform and slide hips back positioning knees with slight bend.
exercises.execution: Pull cable attachment to waist while pulling torso upright. Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Wide Grip Straight Back Seated Row
exercises.preparation: Sit slightly forward on bench or platform in order to grasp cable bar attachment with wider than shoulder width overhand grip. Place feet on vertical platform. With torso upright, slide hips back positioning knees with slight bend.
exercises.execution: Pull cable attachment to waist. Pull shoulders back and lift chest by arching back. Return until arms are extended, back is straight, and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bent-over Row
exercises.preparation: Kneel over side of bench by placing knee and hand of supporting arm on bench. Position foot of opposite leg slightly back to side. Grasp dumbbell from floor.
exercises.execution: Pull dumbbell to up to side until it makes contact with ribs or until upper arm is just beyond horizontal. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is stretched downward. Repeat and continue with opposite arm.
instructions: Kneel over side of bench by placing knee and hand of supporting arm on bench. Position foot of opposite leg slightly back to side. Grasp dumbbell from floor.

Pull dumbbell to up to side until it makes contact with ribs or until upper arm is just beyond horizontal. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is stretched downward. Repeat and continue with opposite arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Row
exercises.preparation: Lie chest down on elevated bench. Grasp dumbbells below.
exercises.execution: Pull dumbbells up to sides. Arch thoracic spine, pull shoulder blades back, and continue to pull until upper arms are just beyond height of back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.
instructions: Lie chest down on elevated bench. Grasp dumbbells below.

exercises.name: Fixed Bar Back Stretch
exercises.preparation: Stand facing stationary bar. Grasp stationary bar with one hand approximately waist height.
exercises.execution: Bend over allowing hips to fall back. Slightly lean torso toward stretched arm. Hold stretch. Repeat with opposite side.
instructions: Stand facing stationary bar. Grasp stationary bar with one hand approximately waist height.

exercises.name: Lever Isolateral Narrow Grip Seated Row (plate loaded)
exercises.preparation: Sit on seat and position chest against pad. Grasp lever handles with underhand grip.
exercises.execution: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever Neutral Grip Incline Row (plate loaded)
exercises.preparation: Lie prone on inclined platform and place feet on foot rest. Grasp angled handles and lift lever out of support rack. Position lever directly under body with arms extended down.
exercises.execution: Pull lever up. As lever approaches, hyperextend thoracic spine and squeeze shoulders back. Lower lever until arms are extended and shoulders are pulled downward. Repeat.

exercises.execution: Pull handles to waist while straightening torso upright. Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever Straight Back Seated Row (no chest pad)
exercises.preparation: Sit on seat with feet positioned on foot bar or platform. Grasp handles with each hand. Position torso upright with knees bent slightly.
exercises.execution: Pull handles to body. Pull shoulders back and lift chest by arching back. Return until arms are extended, back is straight, and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever T-bar Row (plate loaded)
exercises.preparation: Bend knees slightly and bend over lever handles with back straight. Grasp lever handles with shoulder width to wide overhand grip.
exercises.execution: Pull lever up to torso. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever Wide Grip Incline Row (plate loaded)
exercises.preparation: Lie prone on inclined platform and place feet on foot rest. Grasp wide handles and lift lever out of support rack. Position lever directly under body with arms extended down.
exercises.execution: Pull lever up. As lever approaches, hyperextend thoracic spine and squeeze shoulders back. Lower lever until arms are extended and shoulders are pulled downward. Repeat.
instructions: Lie prone on inclined platform and place feet on foot rest. Grasp wide handles and lift lever out of support rack. Position lever directly under body with arms extended down.
Pull lever up. As lever approaches, hyperextend thoracic spine and squeeze shoulders back. Lower lever until arms are extended and shoulders are pulled downward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever Wide Grip Seated Row
exercises.preparation: Sit on seat and position chest against pad. Grasp outer lever handles with overhand grip.
exercises.execution: Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Sit on seat and position chest against pad. Grasp outer lever handles with overhand grip.
Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever Isolateral Wide Grip Seated Row (high bar, plate loaded)
exercises.preparation: Sit on seat and position chest against pad. Grasp lever handles with underhand grip.
exercises.execution: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Lever Back Stretch
exercises.preparation: Sit on seat in forward position with lower legs on shin pad, feet on foot rest. Place hands through wrist straps. Hold upper bar with arms crossed, overhand grip.
exercises.execution: Push and lower seat back. Hold stretch. Repeat with opposite arm position.

exercises.name: Smith Bent-over Row
exercises.preparation: Bend knees slightly and bend over bar with back straight. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Disengage bar by rotating bar back.
exercises.execution: Pull bar to upper waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.
instructions: Bend knees slightly and bend over bar with back straight. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Disengage bar by rotating bar back.
Pull bar to upper waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Suspended Inverted Row
exercises.preparation: Position suspension handles higher than arms' length above floor. Sit on floor and grasp handles. Position body supine hanging from handles with arms straight, shoulders under handles, body straight, and back of heels on floor.
exercises.execution: Pull body up so sides of chest make contact with handles while keeping body straight. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Suspended One Arm Row
exercises.preparation: Grasp suspension handle and momentarily step back until arm is extended forward and straight. While keeping arm straight and shoulder back, step forward so body reclines back behind suspension handles. Position body and legs straight at desired angle, hanging from handle with arm straight. Place resting arm straight against side or front of thigh.
exercises.execution: Pull body up so side of chest makes contact with handle while keeping body and legs straight. Return until arm is extended straight and shoulder is stretched forward. Repeat.

Place resting arm straight against side or front of thigh.
Pull body up so side of chest makes contact with handle while keeping body and legs straight. Return until arm is extended straight and shoulder is stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.preparation: Grasp suspension handles and momentarily step back until arms are extended forward and straight. While keeping arms straight and shoulders back, step forward so body reclines back behind suspension handles. exercises.execution: Pull body up so sides of chest make contact with handles while keeping body and legs straight. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Weighted Inverted Row
exercises.preparation: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Place back of heels on elevated surface.
exercises.execution: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.
instructions: Lay on back under fixed horizontal bar. Grasp bar with wide overhand grip. Place back of heels on elevated surface.
Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.preparation: Grasp bar with shoulder width underhand grip.
exercises.execution: With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.
instructions: Grasp bar with shoulder width underhand grip.
With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable Alternating Isolateral Curl
exercises.preparation: Stand between or facing double low pulleys. Grasp stirrups to each side, palms facing forward.
exercises.execution: Pull one stirrup up forward and upward toward shoulder while keeping elbow stationary. Return until arm is fully extended. Repeat on other arm, alternating between sides.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.preparation: Grasp low pulley cable bar with shoulder width underhand grip. Stand close to pulley.
exercises.execution: With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.
instructions: Grasp low pulley cable bar with shoulder width underhand grip. Stand close to pulley.

exercises.name: Cable Isolateral Curl
exercises.preparation: Stand between or facing double low pulleys. Grasp stirrups to each side, palms facing forward.
exercises.execution: Pull stirrups forward and upward toward shoulders while keeping elbows stationary. Return until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

exercises.name: Cable One Arm Curl
exercises.preparation: Face low pulley and grasp stirrup cable attachment to one side with underhand grip.
exercises.execution: With elbow to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.
